scripts.build: npm run test:connection-dialog && npm run test:connection-commands && npm run test:dialog-layout && vue-tsc --noEmit && vite build
scripts.test:connection-commands: tsx --test src/utils/databaseGatewayCommands.test.ts src/utils/databaseUpstreamTLS.test.ts src/utils/provisioningRequest.test.ts src/utils/connectionLinks.test.ts src/utils/guacamoleProtocol.test.ts src/utils/sshHostIdentity.test.ts src/config/databaseClients.test.ts src/components/ConnectionConfigDialog.test.ts src/api/systemSettings.test.ts
